name: Sea Pines Golf Course
notes: Military-owned course (Army Golf Club II) set within the Suan Son Pradiphat (Sea Pine Tree Garden) at Thanarat military camp. Thailand's closest golf course to the sea — six holes run right next to the beach on the Gulf of Thailand, separated from mountain-side holes by a railway line. Army officers and their guests have priority; public golfers may need to yield tee times if military groups arrive. 7,305 yards, links-style layout. Green fee is flat rate (no weekday/weekend distinction confirmed on huahingolfcourse.com — listed at THB 1,500). huahingolfcourse.com package rates from THB 2,200 per person for 4 players. One source (1golf.eu) listed THB 2,400; golfsavers.com listed THB 1,900 — may reflect different seasons or booking channels. Caddie tip of THB 400+ recommended. Also known locally as 'Seapine Golf Club'. GPS coordinates from huahingolfcourse.com listing: 12°30'20.8"N, 99°58'26.1"E (converted to decimal: 12.5058, 99.9739).
